description: v5 retroactive enrichment: Entropy was ALWAYS accumulating. Food was always decaying. Solar panels were always degrading. Crew isolation was always building. We just started measuring it. Based on: NASA food shelf-life studies, Spirit/Opportunity solar degradation curves, HI-SEAS psychological data, ISS maintenance logs.
data_sources: NASA food science shelf-life studies (lyophilized rations, 2015-2025)
Spirit/Opportunity solar panel degradation curves (14 years of data)
HI-SEAS Hawaii analog: crew psychological metrics (missions I-VI)
ISS maintenance logs: crew-hours per module over 25 years
